name: earmark-erji-demo
description: 耳记 (Earmark) — turns any long document into an active-recall audio lesson: you listen, get interrupted by Socratic checkpoints, watch a live retention map build, and get an auto-scheduled 60s re-listen queue for weak concepts. Reframes 'document → audio' from content consumption to measurable retention. Static frontend demo (mock corpus, real recall/mastery logic, browser speechSynthesis for optional narration).
